# BC Refrigeração - Refrigeração Comercial e Reefer

BC Refrigeração is a highly specialized commercial and industrial refrigeration service company based in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil.

## General Information
- **Company Name:** BC Refrigeração (BC Refrigeração Comercial e Reefer)
- **Base Address:** Av. Antônio J. Tavares, 90, Centro, Penha - SC, 88385-000, Brazil
- **Contact Phone:** (47) 3305-9452 (Phone and WhatsApp)
- **Email:** contato@bcrefrigeracaosc.com.br
- **Operating Hours:** Monday to Friday 08:00–18:00, Saturday 08:00–12:00 (Emergency support 24h via WhatsApp)
- **Serving Area:** 200 km radius in Santa Catarina, covering 13 neighborhoods in Penha and 36 surrounding cities.
- **Website:** https://www.bcrefrigeracaosc.com.br

## Core Services Offered

1. **Conserto de Container Reefer (Refrigerated Container Repair)**
   - 24/7 emergency repair in ports & retroports (Navegantes, Itajaí, Piçarras, etc.).
   - Pre-Trip Inspection (PTI) following global standards.
   - Authorized technical support for Carrier Transicold, Thermo King, Daikin, Star Cool, and Mitsubishi.

2. **Conserto de Lava e Seca (Wash & Dry Machine Repair)**
   - Fast home visits for LG, Samsung, Electrolux, Midea, and more.
   - Specialization in Direct Drive and Inverter motors, replacement of bearing systems, and dryer duct cleaning.

3. **Ar-Condicionado (Air Conditioning Systems)**
   - Calculation of thermal load, installation, chemical cleaning, and PMOC (Plano de Manutenção, Operação e Controle) compliance with Anvisa.
   - Systems: Splits, Multi-Splits, Cassettes, VRFs.

4. **Loja de Peças (Refrigeration Parts Shop)**
   - In-store collection in Penha for compressors (Embraco, Tecumseh, Elgin), gases (R134a, R410a, R600a), digital controllers (Full Gauge, Danfoss), and professional tools.

5. **Câmara Frigorífica (Cold Rooms)**
   - Custom thermal design (PUR/EPS), insulation panels, automated defrost logic, and emergency maintenance.

6. **Walk in Cooler**
   - Beverage exhibition cold rooms (First-In, First-Out concept), heated dual-pane glass doors, and LED illumination.

7. **Beer Cave**
   - Premium beverage chambers keeping beer between -2°C and -4°C with precise digital control.

8. **Chiller**
   - Heavy industrial water chillers for plastics, metal, chemical, and hospital equipment. Compressor overhaul (Screw & Scroll).

9. **Conserto de Geladeiras (Fridge & Freezer Repair)**
   - Diagnostic and repair of Frost Free, Side-by-Side, French Door, and Inverter fridges.

## Service Locations in Santa Catarina

- **Penha (13 Neighborhoods):** Centro, Armação, Gravatá, Praia Alegre, Praia Grande, São Cristóvão, Santa Lídia, Nossa Senhora de Fátima, Praia do Quilombo, Praia Vermelha, Sertãozinho, Praia da Saudade, Ponta da Vigia.
- **Litoral Imediato:** Balneário Piçarras, Navegantes, Itajaí, Balneário Camboriú, Camboriú, Itapema, Porto Belo, Bombinhas, Barra Velha, São João do Itaperiu.
- **Vale do Itajaí:** Brusque, Gaspar, Ilhota, Luiz Alves, Blumenau, Pomerode, Indaial, Timbó, Rio do Sul.
- **Norte SC:** Joinville, Araquari, Guaramirim, Jaraguá do Sul, Schroeder, Massaranduba, Corupá, São Francisco do Sul, Balneário Barra do Sul, Itapoá, Garuva.
- **Grande Florianópolis:** Tijucas, Governador Celso Ramos, Biguaçu, São José, Florianópolis, Palhoça.
